author: Sarah Dayan
subject: feat(react-instantsearch-v7): remove deprecated APIs (#5780)
body:
BREAKING CHANGE: The following APIs have been removed:
- useInstantSearch().use -> useInstantSearch().addMiddlewares
- <Stats translations={{ stats: "..." }} /> -> <Stats translations={{ rootElementText: "..." }} />

Co-authored-by: Dhaya <154633+dhayab@users.noreply.github.com>
